title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zoho Corporation Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Zoho Corporation Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Zoho Corporation Holdings Services in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zoho Corporation Holdings Services:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation Holdings Services!
